problem.title: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder Traversal
problem.description: Given two integer arrays preorder and inorder where preorder is the preorder traversal of a binary tree and inorder is the inorder traversal of the same tree, construct and return the binary tree.

example.explanation: Preorder's first element is root. Find it in inorder to split left/right subtrees.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Recursive
solutions.description: The first element of preorder is always the current subtree's root. Find its position in inorder (via a HashMap for O(1) lookup) to determine the sizes of the left and right subtrees, then recursively build each subtree by adjusting the preorder and inorder bounds.
